title: catesbaea glabra
intro: Catesbaea glabra, also known as the horse gentian, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Catesbaea glabra include its potential to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as a digestive aid. Catesbaea glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
